records.violation_narrative: [Vacant Lot] Cut all high weeds and brush on the premises including around all structures and the fence line**pull weeds off the fence**. As well as any high weeds in the rear utility easement (alley way). Properly remove and dispose of all litter and solid waste accumulated on the premises. It is the property owner's/tenant’s responsibility to clear and clean (Mow, Trim, Scrape, and Sweep) all overgrown grass and debris from the sidewalk, curb, and gutter areas, to include onto the street. Failure to abate these violations may result in a citation and a fine from the Municipal Courts. Failure to comply may result in the city abating the violation at the property owner's expense.   Property must be maintained on a regular basis and this notification is effective for one year of receiving the letter. If you have any additional questions, any updates on the clean-up or to notify that you received the notice, please call me to make an appointment at (361) 945-0176 or E-mail: AlexanderG@CorpusChristiTX.Gov.  Communication is vital to help prevent any citations to be written from non-compliance

FAILURE TO ABATE THESE VIOLATIONS MAY RESULT IN A CITATION AND A FINE FROM THE MUNICIPAL COURTS. IF PROPERTY IS CUT AND MAINTAINED BEFORE RECIEVING THIS NOTICE, THANK YOU AND DISREGARD BUT PLEASE CONTINUE TO MAINTAIN PROPERTY. IF YOU HAVE ANY ADDITIONAL QUESTIONS, PLEASE CALL JOSE OLVERA AT 361-945-0201 OR EMAIL AT JOSEO2@CORPUSCHRISTITX.GOV THANK YOU.

[Care of Premises] GRASS AND WEEDS THAT ARE 12 INCHES HIGH OR HIGHER ARE IN VIOLATION OF CITY ORDINANCE.  MUST MOW ALL GRASS AND WEEDS INCLUDING THE CURB, ALONG ANY FENCE LINE, ANY REAR EASEMENT. PROPERTY MUST BE MAINTAINED ON A REGULAR BASIS.    IT IS THE PROPERTY OWNER'S RESPONSIBILITY TO MOW, TRIM, SCRAPE AND SWEEP THE SIDEWALK, CURB, & GUTTER.  IT IS A VIOLATION OF CITY ORDINANCE TO ALLOW ANY SIDEWALK, CURB, OR GUTTER TO BECOME COVERED WITH DIRT, SAND, LEAVES, OR TO BECOME OVERGROWN WITH WEEDS OR GRASS.    ALTHOUGH MAINTAINED BY THE PROPERTY OWNER, THE SIDEWALK IS A PUBLIC RIGHT-OF-WAY THAT MUST BE KEPT PASSABLE FOR PEDESTRIAN TRAFFIC.  CURB AND GUTTER MUST REMAIN CLEAR FOR PROPERTY STORM WATER DRAINAGE AND TO ALLOW FLOW OF STREAM.   FAILURE TO COMPLY WILL RESULT IN THE CITY ABATING THESE VIOLATIONS LISTED ABOVE AT THE PROPERTY OWNER'S EXPENSE AND WILL RESULT IN A CITATION AND A FINE.    IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS, YOU CAN CONTACT ME AT (361) 945-0232 OR VIA EMAIL AT PAULINAG@CORPUSCHRISTITX.GOV. THANK YOU.

IT IS A VIOLATION OF CITY ORDINANCE TO ALLOW ANY SIDEWALK, CURB, OR GUTTER TO BECOME COVERED WITH DIRT, SAND, LEAVES, OR TO BECOME OVERGROWN WITH WEEDS OR GRASS.  ALTHOUGH MAINTAINED BY THE PROPERTY OWNER, THE SIDEWALK IS A PUBLIC RIGHT-OF-WAY THAT MUST BE KEPT PASSABLE FOR PEDESTRIAN TRAFFIC.  CURB AND GUTTER MUST REMAIN CLEAR FOR PROPERTY STORM WATER DRAINAGE AND TO ALLOW FLOW OF STREAM.   FAILURE TO COMPLY WILL RESULT IN A CITATION AND A FINE.    IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS, YOU CAN REACH ME AT (361) 415-1379 OR EMAIL TIFFANYO@CORPUSCHRISTITX.GOV. THANK YOU.

[PMC Standards] Every residence living in a structure is required to use a sink, toilet, bathtub, shower, or other plumbing fixtures that is properly connected to a public water system (Utilities). Please acquire a water supply with the City of Corpus Christi to allow both hot and cold water to be distributed to the household. Please call me to set-up a time to show me that the property has utilities or to let me know the status of the property, (361) 945-0176 or AlexanderG@CorpusChristiTX.Gov  •  [Care of Premises] Cut all high weeds and brush on the premises including around all structures and the fence line**pull weeds off the fence**. As well as any high weeds in the rear utility easement (alley way). Properly remove and dispose of all litter and solid waste accumulated on the premises. It is the property owner's/tenant’s responsibility to clear and clean (Mow, Trim, Scrape, and Sweep) all overgrown grass and debris from the sidewalk, curb, and gutter areas, to include onto the street. Failure to abate these violations may result in a citation and a fine from the Municipal Courts. Failure to comply may result in the city abating the violation at the property owner's expense.   Property must be maintained on a regular basis and this notification is effective for one year of receiving the letter. If you have any additional questions, any updates on the clean-up or to notify that you received the notice, please call me to make an appointment at (361) 945-0176 or E-mail: AlexanderG@cctexas.com.  Communication is vital to help prevent any citations to be written from non-compliance.

records.violation_narrative: [Care of Premises] GRASS AND WEEDS THAT ARE 12 INCHES HIGH OR HIGHER ARE IN VIOLATION OF CITY ORDINANCE. CITY ORDINANCE DOES NOT ALLOW LITTER, TRASH, DEBRIS, RUBBISH, CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS, APPLIANCES, TIRES AUTOMOBILE PARTS, OR ANY OTHER SOLID WASTE IN OPEN STORAGE ON PROPERTY. LITTER AND SOLID WASTE MUST REMOVED AND BE PROPERLY DISPOSED OF. IT IS THE PROPERTY OWNER'S RESPONSIBILITY TO MOW, TRIM, SCRAPE AND SWEEP THE SIDEWALK, CURB, & GUTTER. IT IS A VIOLATION OF CITY ORDINANCE TO ALLOW ANY SIDEWALK, CURB, OR GUTTER TO BECOME COVERED WITH DIRT, SAND, LEAVES, OR TO BECOME OVERGROWN WITH WEEDS OR GRASS. ALTHOUGH MAINTAINED BY THE PROPERTY OWNER, THE SIDEWALK IS A PUBLIC RIGHT-OF-WAY THAT MUST BE KEPT PASSABLE FOR PEDESTRIAN TRAFFIC. CURB AND GUTTER MUST REMAIN CLEAR FOR PROPERTY STORM WATER DRAINAGE AND TO ALLOW FLOW OF STREAM. FAILURE TO COMPLY WILL RESULT IN THE CITY ABATING THESE VIOLATIONS LISTED ABOVE AT THE PROPERTY OWNER'S EXPENSE AND WILL RESULT IN A CITATION AND A FINE. Plumbing fixtures shall be maintained in a safe, sanitary and functional condition  504.3 PLUMBING SYSTEM HAZARDS - Where it is found that a plumbing system in a structure constitutes a hazard to the occupants or the structure by reason of inadequate service, inadequate venting, cross connection, back siphonage, improper installation, deterioration or damage or for similar reasons, the code official shall require the defects to be corrected to eliminate the hazard.  505.1 WATER SYSTEM/GENERAL - Every sink, lavatory, bathtub or shower, drinking fountain, water closet or other plumbing fixture shall be properly connected to either a public water system or to an approved private water system. Kitchen sinks, lavatories, laundry facilities, bathtubs and showers shall be supplied with hot or tempered and cold running water in accordance with the International Plumbing Code.  506.1 SANITARY DRAINAGE SYSTEM/GENERAL - Plumbing fixtures shall be properly connected to either a public sewer system or to an approved private sewage disposal system. records.violation_narrative: [Vacant Lot] Cut all high weeds and brush on the premises including around all structures and the fence line**pull weeds off the fence**. As well as any high weeds in the rear utility easement (alley way). Properly remove and dispose of all litter and solid waste accumulated on the premises. It is the property owner's/tenant’s responsibility to clear and clean (Mow, Trim, Scrape, and Sweep) all overgrown grass and debris from the sidewalk, curb, and gutter areas, to include onto the street. Failure to abate these violations may result in a citation and a fine from the Municipal Courts. Failure to comply may result in the city abating the violation at the property owner's expense.   Property must be maintained on a regular basis and this notification is effective for one year of receiving the letter. If you have any additional questions, any updates on the clean-up or to notify that you received the notice, please call me to make an appointment at (361) 945-0176 or E-mail: AlexanderG@CorpusChristiTX.Gov.  Communication is vital to help prevent any citations to be written from non-compliance.

records.violation_narrative: [Care of Premises] PLEASE CUT ALL HIGH WEEDS AND BRUSH ON THE PREMISES INCLUDING AROUND ALL STRUCTURES AND THE FENCE LINE. PROPERLY REMOVE AND DISPOSE OF ALL LITTER AND SOLID WASTE ACCUMULATED ON THE PREMISES. IT IS THE PROPERTY OWNER'S/TENANT’S RESPONSIBILITY TO CLEAR AND CLEAN (MOW, TRIM, SCRAPE, AND SWEEP) ALL OVERGROWN GRASS AND DEBRIS FROM THE SIDEWALK, CURB, AND GUTTER AREAS, TO INCLUDE ONTO THE STREET. PLEASE TRIM OR REMOVE ALL PLANTS/TREE SHRUBS THAT MAY BE CAUSING AN OBSTRUCTION ON THE SIDEWALK AND STREET THAT PREVENTS PASSAGE. FAILURE TO ABATE THESE VIOLATIONS MAY RESULT IN A CITATION AND A FINE FROM THE MUNICIPAL COURTS. IF PROPERTY IS CUT AND MAINTAINED BEFORE RECIEVING THIS NOTICE, THANK YOU AND DISREGARD BUT PLEASE CONTINUE TO MAINTAIN PROPERTY. IF YOU HAVE ANY ADDITIONAL QUESTIONS, PLEASE CALL JOSE OLVERA AT 361-945-0201 OR EMAIL AT JOSEO2@CORPUSCHRISTITX.GOV THANK YOU.  •  [PMC Standards] PER THE INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY MAINTENANCE CODE (IPMC) REQUIREMENTS, ALL OCCUPIED PROPERTIES ARE TO HAVE A PUBLIC WATER SYSTEM OR APPROVED PRIVATE WATER SYSTEM TO PROVIDE HOT AND COLD WATER TO ALL KITCHEN SINKS, BATHTUBS, TOILETS AND TO ANY ADDITIONAL PLUMBING FIXTURES ATTACHED TO THE PROPERTY.  AS THE PROPERTY OWNER, YOU ARE TO ENSURE THAT THE PROPERTY HAS ACTIVE UTILITIES WHILE BEING OCCUPIED BY A TENANT.   IT IS THE PROPERTY OWNER'S RESPONSIBILITY TO ADHERE TO THE INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY MAINTENANCE CODE AND ENSURE THAT ALL REQUIREMENTS ARE MET AS STATED. THESE VIOLATIONS MAY RESULT IN A CITATION AND A FINE FROM THE MUNICIPAL COURTS.  THE PROPERTY MUST BE MAINTAINED AND STAY WITHIN COMPLIANCE OF THE INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY MAINTENANCE CODE.  PLEASE REPAIR THE BACK OF THE PROPERTY THAT CAVED IN. ROOF, FASCIA BOARDS, WINDOWS, EXTERIOR WALLS, GARAGE DOOR NEED TO BE REPAIRED OR REMOVED (WITH THE APPROPRIATE PERMITS).  PLEASE REPAIR GAPS IN BETWEEN EXTERIOR WALLS/SIDING PLANKS. EXTERIOR OF THE PROPERTY NEEDS TO BE REPAINTED TO PROTECT THE PROPERTY FROM THE ELEMENTS.  THIS NOTIFICATION IS EFFECTIVE FOR ONE YEAR OF RECEIVING THE LETTER. IF YOU HAVE ANY ADDITIONAL QUESTIONS, INFORMATION OR UPDATES IN REGARD TO THIS NOTICE, PLEASE CONTACT CODE COMPLIANCE OFFICER J. OLVERA AT (361) 945-0201 OR E-MAIL: JOSEO2@CORPUSCHRISTITX.GOV. THANK YOU.

records.violation_narrative: [Vacant Lot] Cut all high weeds and brush on the premises including around all structures and the fence line**pull weeds off the fence**. As well as any high weeds in the rear utility easement (alley way). Properly remove and dispose of all litter and solid waste accumulated on the premises. It is the property owner's/tenant’s responsibility to clear and clean (Mow, Trim, Scrape, and Sweep) all overgrown grass and debris from the sidewalk, curb, and gutter areas, to include onto the street. Failure to abate these violations may result in a citation and a fine from the Municipal Courts. Failure to comply may result in the city abating the violation at the property owner's expense.   Property must be maintained on a regular basis and this notification is effective for one year of receiving the letter. If you have any additional questions, any updates on the clean-up or to notify that you received the notice, please call me to make an appointment at (361) 945-0176 or E-mail: AlexnaderG@CorpusChristiTX.gov.  Communication is vital to help prevent any citations to be written from non-compliance.

IF YOU HAVE AN EASEMENT (ALLEY WAY OR STREET BEHIND THE REAR OF THE PROPERTY THAT HAS GRASS, TREES, OR SHRUBS) - PLEASE PULL AND/OR MOW ANY HIGH GRASS AND/OR WEEDS IN ANY REAR EASEMENT. PROPERTY AND EASEMENT MUST BE MAINTAINED ON A REGULAR BASIS.    CITY ORDINANCE DOES NOT ALLOW LITTER, TRASH, DEBRIS, RUBBISH, CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS, APPLIANCES, TIRES OR AUTOMOBILE PARTS, OR ANY OTHER SOLID WASTE IN OPEN STORAGE ON THE PROPERTY. ALL LITTER AND SOLID WASTE MUST REMOVED AND BE PROPERLY DISPOSED OF – THE PROPERTY MUST BE MAINTAINED ON A REGULAR BASIS. PLEASE REMOVE ALL DISCARDED ITEMS AND DEBRIS FROM THE PROPERTY ALONG WITH ANY OTHER ITEMS THAT MAY BE PRESENT AND ARE NOT MEANT TO BE STORED OUTSIDE.  IT IS THE PROPERTY OWNER'S RESPONSIBILITY TO MOW, TRIM, SCRAPE AND SWEEP THE SIDEWALK, CURB, & GUTTER. CURB AND GUTTER MUST REMAIN CLEAR FOR PROPERTY STORM WATER DRAINAGE AND TO ALLOW FLOW OF STREAM. THE PROPERTY MUST BE MAINTAINED ON A REGULAR BASIS. As well as any high weeds in the rear utility easement (alley way). Properly remove and dispose of all litter and solid waste accumulated on the premises. It is the property owner's/tenant’s responsibility to clear and clean (Mow, Trim, Scrape, and Sweep) all overgrown grass and debris from the sidewalk, curb, and gutter areas, to include onto the street. Failure to abate these violations may result in a citation and a fine from the Municipal Courts. Failure to comply may result in the city abating the violation at the property owner's expense.   Property must be maintained on a regular basis and this notification is effective for one year of receiving the letter.
